_comment: ShibKart complete asset manifest (derived from docs/GAME_DESIGN.md). Generated by tools/generate_shibkart_assets.py via the PROVEN Qwen-Image-Edit workflow: each asset starts as a procedural SILHOUETTE (drawn by the generator, keyed by 'shape'), which ComfyUI polishes into a finished sprite/texture at the given 'denoise'. NO style LoRAs. Boshi CHARACTERS are not here - BoshiCore owns them.
_style: clean crisp high-quality 32-bit-era prerendered game art, bright saturated cartoon colors, soft top light, bold readable silhouette, no text, no watermark, no border
